name: trap-vague-large-dataset
description: Trap: vague request on a 4032-row dataset — model must make smart choices
messages: Show me something interesting about this data
rubric: The energy dataset has 4032 rows across 4 buildings, 24 hours, 7 weekdays, with consumption/temperature/occupancy. The model must make a smart choice. ACCEPTABLE: heatmap of consumption by hour/weekday, line chart of consumption over time by building, scatter of temperature vs consumption, bar of avg consumption by building. FAIL if model renders all 4032 points as individual bars (unreadable). FAIL if model asks for clarification without producing any chart. FAIL if the chart is broken or unreadable. Model should call filter_data or lookup_docs to explore the data before charting.
